variants.title: Filtrec XD250G10A/ESD DIN Pressure Filter
variants.description: Genuine Filtrec XD250G10A/ESD. This Filtrec element is designed to meet or exceed the quality and performance of brand OEM’s ensuring superior filtration performance and long-lasting durability. Engineered with their high performance media and a durable design, the XD250G10A/ESD provides reliable and consistent performance over its lifespan, even in harsh operating environments. When you order from FilterFinder, you can trust that you are getting a reliable and high-quality replacement filter that will keep your system running smoothly.
specifications: Style: DIN Pressure Filter, Media: Glass Fiber (Anti-Static), Efficiency 1: 10µ @ β200, Efficiency 2: 12µ @ β1000, Outer Diameter: 78.0 mm, Inner Diameter: 40.5 mm, Length: 248.0 mm, Δ Collapse Pressure: 21 bar, Seal Material: Nitrile, Temperature Range: -30 - +100°C, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 10µ @ β200, Media Type: Glass Fiber (Anti-Static), Flow Direction: OUT-IN, Collapse Pressure: 21 BAR, Seal: Nitrile

variants.title: Hydac 0250 DN 010 BN4HC /-SFREE DIN Pressure Filter | Replaces the Filtrec XD250G10A/ESD
variants.option1Value: Hydac 0250 DN 010 BN4HC /-SFREE DIN Pressure Filter | Replaces the Filtrec XD250G10A/ESD
variants.description: Genuine Hydac 0250 DN 010 BN4HC /-SFREE DIN Pressure Filter. Built to HYDAC’s OEM specifications and quality standards, this genuine part offers reliable performance, long service life and a precise fit. It’s suitable for a wide range of hydraulic and process applications, helping protect equipment, reduce downtime and maintain system cleanliness. For best results, match the part code to your equipment manual and verify key dimensions and ratings (size, connection, filtration grade/flow) before installation.

variants.title: MicroFit® MFHLP31538 UltraGen III DIN Pressure Filter | Replaces the Filtrec XD250G10A/ESD
variants.option1Value: MicroFit® MFHLP31538 UltraGen III DIN Pressure Filter | Replaces the Filtrec XD250G10A/ESD
variants.description: MicroFit® MFHLP31538 UltraGen III DIN Pressure Filter. Engineered and manufactured in Great Britain the MFHLP30166 is designed to meet or exceed the quality and performance of OEM quality standards, ensuring superior filtration performance and the longest possible filter life. Building on over 50 years of filtration expertise, the UltraGen III series is the third generation of MicroFit® filter media, delivering exceptional efficiency and reliability. FilterFinder is an approved distributor of MicroFit® filters. With expert product knowledge, dedicated support, and a large stock availability, FilterFinder ensures you receive the parts you need when you need them, every time.
